tasks.title: Research event bus, watcher, and real-time integration options for HiveMind dashboard
Fix snapshot.ts data flow bug, wire keyboard shortcuts in index.tsx to real API calls, add connection status tracking

Resumed and successfully completed Phase 1: Fixed data flow bugs and wired keyboard shortcuts (c, m, x, t) to actual OpenCode API calls in the dashboard. Resolved TypeScript errors caused by the introduction of the bilingual i18n logic. Validated with clean builds and passing test suites. Ready to proceed to Phase 2 (Input Modals) and Phase 3 (SSE Real-time streaming).
W3-I1 Swarm lane: implement core surface in dashboard-v2 (sequential dependency chain)

tasks.title: Phase 2 Complete: Input Modal System implemented. Fixed TypeScript errors (borderBottom, SelectModal import, modal property). Wired keyboard handlers (c, m, x) to open InputModal instead of hardcoded API calls. Added modal state management (OPEN_MODAL, CLOSE_MODAL). Added i18n keys for modal titles (EN/VI). TypeScript compiles clean. Root tests pass (197/197).
W3 closeout + W4 handoff readiness decision
